absorption: Aggressive selling with high negative delta (-543) is being absorbed at the 62500-62510 level, preventing further price decline.
dom_observation: Significant bid absorption at 62510-62500. A very large stacked bid wall of 217 lots is visible at 62450, acting as strong support.
reasoning: Aggressive sellers failed to break price lower, and their volume is being absorbed by passive buyers at a key level just below the vPOC, indicating a high probability of a rotation upwards.
